holdings.infoBox: IWY is an equity ETF with a total of 114 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.20%, Apple at 13.09%, Microsoft at 9.14%, Broadcom at 4.69%, and Amazon.com at 4.50%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell Top 200 Growth ETF (IWY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Top 200 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of growth stocks selected from 200 of the largest US companies. IWY was launched on Sep 22, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.
